title: wyred contract v0 — SPICE deck confession sidecar (.cir.json)
description: Descriptive schema for the SPICE .cir.json confession sidecar, extracted from its producer wyred/paths.py `build_cir` (WyredPlanSpice step 1.3 / WyredSpiceContract §5). It describes the MACHINE-READABLE sidecar that rides alongside the human-readable ngspice `.cir` deck. NOTE: the `.cir` DECK itself is raw ngspice text, NOT JSON, and is deliberately outside the JSON contract — the validator globs only *.json, so no `.cir` schema exists or is possible; the deck's trust comes from crosscheck_cir's XCIR_* differential against the L2, not from JSON-schema validation. Six top-level keys, all always emitted: artifact/modelled/node_map/not_simulated/path/stamp. `path` is const "cir_confession". `modelled` maps every rendered refdes to its element-letter token (R/C/L/D/V/I) or "subckt:<name>"; `node_map` maps every L2 net name to its sanitized deck node token (ground -> "0", §3); `not_simulated` names every unmodelled refdes with its kind + reason (§5). Tamper-probeable: crosscheck_cir compares every field against the L2 + the deck each run (XCIR_CONFESSION). additionalProperties:false throughout.

modelled.description: map <refdes> -> the token build_cir recorded for the rendered element: a single element letter (R/C/L/D/V/I) for a §1/§2 primitive, or "subckt:<name>" for a subckt-ref (§1). Empty {} when the deck models nothing.

node_map.description: map <L2 net name> -> deck node token (§3 sanitization: ground-kind nets -> "0", others -> the name-preserving sanitized token). Bijective except for the many-to-one ground collapse.

not_simulated.description: the confession (§5): every component the deck does NOT model, each named with its refdes, its L2 kind, and the reason it was not modelled. Empty [] for a fully-modelled intent (e.g. intent_10_spice_divider).

not_simulated_entry.description: One confessed unmodelled component. All three keys always emitted. `reason` is the closed vocabulary build_cir emits: "no_model" (kind not in the §2 auto-map table and no explicit spice_model) or "value_unparseable" (§2a: a value that does not canonicalize is never a guessed number).
